Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There may be dangerous chemicals inside.[n]I better not go in without permission...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2061 0 0}There might be chemicals in there, so you prolly shouldn't go in.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}I think the photography club sets up here. I wonder if there are any juicy photos inside...[n]{f 1 1}
